LAW AND MOTION 302, ATTY. BARRY K. TAGAWA'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFFS GARY MCKAE AND CYNTHIA MCKAE IS GRANTED. AFTER READING ALL THE PAPERS INCLUDING THE OPPOSITION, THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE IS A BREAKDOWN BETWEEN CLIENT AND ATTORNEY RELATIONSHIP. THE CASE IS STILL IN ITS EARLY STAGE AND NOTHING HAS BEEN SET FOR TRIAL YET. 2 ORDERS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENNA WARD, CSR # 7077

APPEARANCES - BARRY K. TAGAWA, TEL. NO. 951-8600, MOVING PARTY;
GARY MCKAE & CYNTHIA MCKAE, PLAINTIFFS ALSO PRESENT IN COURT.

RULING - ATTY. BARRY K. TAGAWA'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFFS GARY MCKAE and CYNTHIA MCKAE IS GRANTED. AFTER READING ALL THE PAPERS INCLUDING THE OPPOSITION, THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE IS A BREAKDOWN BETWEEN CLIENT AND ATTORNEY RELATIONSHIP. THE CASE IS STILL IN ITS EARLY STAGE AND NOTHING HAS BEEN SET FOR TRIAL YET. 2 ORDERS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Barry Tagawa, Esq. of the Law Offices of Barry Tagawa, PC, Tel. 415.951.8600, counsel for plaintiffs, and moving party;
Gary McKae and Cynthia McKae, plaintiffs and opposing parties, appearing on their own behalf.

The matter was discussed. The Court was presented with file-endorsed copies of plaintiff's opposition papers. ATTY. BARRY K. TAGAWA'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF GARY P. MCKAE is continued to January 7, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302, a date that was agreed upon by the parties. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976.
